name: neural_psychology_matrix
purpose: Amplify automation content with psychological triggers that increase authority, urgency, and demand.

psychological_triggers.scarcity: Highlight exclusivity: limited beta slots, documented templates, production-ready frameworks.
psychological_triggers.social_proof: Use demos, repos, and frameworks as proof until case studies arrive.
psychological_triggers.authority: Position as specialist: automation developer who ships reliable systems.
psychological_triggers.curiosity: Open loops with architecture teasers and manual vs automated comparisons.
psychological_triggers.reciprocity: Offer free audits and prompt packs → leads to paid implementations.
psychological_triggers.contrast: Show ROI/time-saved difference between manual work vs automated workflows.
psychological_triggers.commitment_consistency: Encourage small actions (DM 'WORKFLOW') → lead to production projects.
psychological_triggers.novelty: Fresh agent patterns, orchestration experiments → stand out as innovative builder.
psychological_triggers.transparency: Share real numbers, failures, and progress logs to build credibility.
psychological_triggers.curation_authority: Provide 'steal this' frameworks and checklists to anchor authority via reciprocity.

application_rules.integration: Embed triggers into builder storytelling, not as gimmicks.
application_rules.tone_alignment: Maintain confident, authoritative, and slightly playful brand voice.
application_rules.emoji_rule: Prefer one directional emoji (👇) max to guide attention.
application_rules.image_usage: Use visuals (workflow diagrams, before/after outputs, logs) to reinforce triggers and engage the audience.
